---
title: "Code Component Examples"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{code_component_examples}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(mighty)
```

These are code component examples. They are not meant to be realisic examples, but rather to show how different types of code components should be specified in terms of metadata

For simplicity's sake, only Roxygen sections required for mighty are included in the examples


1. Single dependency, single output, no parameters
```r
#' Fn 1
#' @param .self
#' @type derivation
#' @depends .self A
#' @outputs B
#' @returns `.self`
fn_1 <-   function(.self) {
 # Busines logic here
  return(.self)
}
```
This function requires the `A` column from the input data set and adds outputs ARM_GRP1.

2. Multiple output columns
```r
#' fn_2
#' @param .self 
#' @type derivation
#' @depends .self A
#' @depends .self B
#' @outputs C
#' @outputs D
#' @returns `.self`
fn_2 <-   function(.self) {
 # Busines logic here
  return(.self)
}
```
This function takes two dependencies, `A` and `B`, and creates two new column `C` and `D`.
Because it creates two columns, it needs to be referenced by two column entries in the ADaM Specs YAML file
